title: [Skyship, Mess]
description: Crates line the area's metal bulkheads, each stamped with the same, crude flame-etched animal pattern.  Spread across the stone floor are a series of thin woven rugs, each coated with varying stains and lingering organic debris, each broad enough for several large-sized individuals to sit upon them, and each with a wooden bucket in their center.  A stitched leather tube hangs above each of these rugs, with several visibly dripping water intermittently into the buckets beneath them.
